steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is B, $7x^{2}+28x$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Distribute 7x across (x+4)
steps.content:
Apply the distributive property: multiply $7x$ by each term inside the parentheses.
$$7x \cdot x = 7x^2$$
$$7x \cdot 4 = 28x$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
The simplified expression is $7x^2 + 28x$.
  • A: $7x^2+4$ — the second term should be $28x$, not the constant $4$. Eliminated.
  • B: $7x^2+28x$ — matches exactly. That is the correct answer.
  • C: $8x^2+4$ — wrong coefficient on $x^2$ and wrong second term. Eliminated.
  • D: $8x^2+11x$ — wrong coefficient on $x^2$. Eliminated.
